name: Butler Reminders
description: Set plain-language reminders that fire a PC toast and/or a WhatsApp message when due.

pcNotify.description: Raise a native Windows toast when a reminder fires. Default true.

whatsappNotify.description: Send a WhatsApp message when a reminder fires (requires whatsappTarget). Default true when a target is set.

whatsappTarget.description: WhatsApp recipient (e.g. +14359942435) for reminder messages. No target = WhatsApp disabled.
